meta.title: The Agentic Players Ball — A private circle for the agentic era
meta.description: A private circle for the founders, builders, and researchers shaping the agentic era. We talk, we meet, and we play. Apply for membership.
meta.og_description: A private circle for the founders, builders, and researchers shaping the agentic era.
hero.tagline: A playground for the agentic elite.
intro.sentence1: A private circle for the founders, builders, and researchers shaping the agentic era.
intro.phrase: We talk, we meet, and we play.
intro.detail: We bring together the people quietly building the next decade of agentic AI. Founders shipping autonomous products, engineers building agent infrastructure, and researchers pushing the frontier. There is no membership fee. Existing members decide who fits.
form.heading: Request An Invite
form.lead: Tell us who you are, we will be in touch.
form.why_placeholder: Tell us what you have founded, built, or researched.
form.referred_label: Have you been referred by anyone?
form.error.email_invalid: That doesn’t look like a valid email
form.error.linkedin_invalid: Must be a LinkedIn profile URL (linkedin.com/in/yourname)
form.error.github_invalid: Must be a GitHub profile URL (github.com/yourname)
form.error.why_required: Tell us what you have built or researched
form.error.voucher_required: Add the LinkedIn URL of who referred you
form.error.voucher_invalid: Must be a LinkedIn profile URL (linkedin.com/in/theirname)
success.heading: Thank you for applying.
success.body1: The Agentic Players Ball is a private circle for founders, builders, and researchers shaping the agentic era. Every application is reviewed by our members. If your work does not align with our membership, we may decline.
success.body2: Either way, you will hear from us.
footer.copyright: Built by Root with ❤️
